content.en:
After some bargaining, Ye Tian finally exchanged three tons of Origin Well Water for a piece of Mixed Yuan Supreme's Strongest Treasure.

And Kunwu Supreme also needed the Origin Well Water very much, and he also took great care of Ye Tian, so Ye Tian also took out three tons of Origin Well Water and traded a defensive Supreme Treasure with him.

With these Origin Well Waters, the Kunwu Supreme and the Mixed Yuan Supreme may be expected to go further.

This transaction, strictly speaking, Ye Tian lost money.

Although the Supreme Treasure is rare, it is not absent in the universe, and a certain refining master in the universe who is proficient in refining weapons can even create the Supreme Treasure, and only needs to find materials that can forge the Supreme Treasure.

Therefore, the Supreme Treasure is valuable, but if other Supremes get such legendary treasures as Origin Well Water, it is impossible to trade them.

Therefore, the origin well water is priceless, and the strongest treasure is valuable, and Ye Tian's trading of the origin well water is undoubtedly a loss-making business.

However, Ye Tian really needs the strongest treasure now.

He wants to recreate a deity, the second deity was originally cultivated by the pseudo-top treasure combined with the talent of the deity, and the potential is limited, and now he can only hide in the desolate realm to dominate, once he leaves the desolate realm, it is nothing.

Therefore, he needs a piece of Supreme Treasure to cultivate the third deity, and the third deity cultivated in this way can reach the supreme combat power, can help Ye Tian solve many troubles, and can even pretend to be the deity to attract firepower.

If someone really wants to deal with him, the third deity can draw out the enemy and save his life.

This time, he really wanted to cultivate a third deity with strong combat power, or even a fourth deity.

And he is not short of resources, which is completely enough to produce a few supreme-level clones.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and Kunwu Supreme left the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain.

After Ye Tian returned to the Holy City Heavenly Pavilion, he began to retreat and cultivate the third deity, the supreme treasure he chose was naturally the sword type supreme treasure, and the third deity cultivated by the sword supreme treasure was suitable for walking the sword path, and Ye Tian's achievements in the sword path were no less than those top sword path supremes.

In addition, Ye Tian also cultivated the fourth deity at the same time, and the supreme treasure he chose was the defensive supreme treasure, and the defensive power of the fourth deity cultivated in this way would be very rebellious.

Fortunately, Ye Tian had obtained a lot of resources in the Origin Realm, so he didn't have to worry about not having enough resources.

Time passed slowly, and the third and fourth deities were cultivated one by one, and under Ye Tian's control, they began to continue to cultivate.

Moreover, the two deities are growing at a very fast pace.

However, Ye Tian attaches great importance to the foundation of the two deities, and will not squeeze the potential like the second deity.

Ye Tian's second deity was just to grow to the realm of Tianzun as soon as possible, so that he could refine the Desolate Lord Order, so he didn't care about the potential, and the second deity belonged to a clone that could be discarded at any time.

However, the third and fourth deities really want to cultivate to the true top supreme level, so naturally they have to be more attentive.

In this way, 10,000 years passed.

In these 10,000 years, the third and fourth deities have reached the ultimate in domination, and they are only one step away from the realm of Tianzun, Ye Tian can let the third and fourth deities step into the Tianzun at any time, but for the foundation of the two deities, they are slow, and they want the two deities to accumulate enough foundation before being promoted.

The third and fourth deities have made great progress, and Ye Tian himself has also made great progress.

In these 10,000 years, Ye Tian had perfected the fifth form of the Tiangang Combat Technique, and had also practiced the eighth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique to the Xiaocheng realm, which cost him a lot of resources, and he was almost exhausted of the resources obtained by the Origin Realm.

In addition to these two aspects, Ye Tian's biggest progress is to create a true technique again, which is a new true technique of the Dao Dao formed by the fusion of the true technique of the Dao of the Dao and the true technique of Chaos-

Hunyuan Slash!

Hunyuan Slash is almost Ye Tian's maximum use of his own heritage, exhausting his aura over the years, plus a series of coincidences to create this move, and it is a real trick.

Ye Tian's current combat power is a fifth-rank supreme combat power, while Hunyuan Slash is a trick that can reach the fourth-rank supreme combat power, but after performing this move, his strength will be exhausted by nearly thirty percent, and he must not use this move until the critical moment.

Except that, Ye Tian has also refined his soul to the extreme of Soul Venerable, and there is no defect in his soul.

"I've improved so much, but unfortunately I still can't cross over to the fourth-rank supreme combat power, according to estimates, I should be equivalent to the middle stage of the fifth-rank supreme combat power now, if you add the Hunyuan slash, it is enough to threaten the top fifth-rank supreme-level combat power. But only against those top fifth-rank supreme-level combat powerhouses who have poor life-saving ability!"

Ye Tian estimated.

At his current level, every step is very difficult, and the time spent in the future will be measured in 10,000 years.

Just when Ye Tian was still thinking about slow progress, something happened in various parts of the universe.

......

Blood-Cang Star Field.

Here, a star field of the Universe Great Clan's Blood Clan, the son of the Twelve Universe Eras, Feng Min, entered a strange secret world and found a lot of good things.

However, he encountered another master in this secret world.

As the son of the era, Feng Min's combat power is not weak, and he is considered to be the best among the sons of the era, although he is not a rebel, but his potential is undoubtedly expected to become a second-class supreme.

However, he was now staring very solemnly at the strange master in front of him, and he felt a threat from the other party.

"Who are you?"

Feng Min asked coldly.

If it was the son of the era of the same camp, it was impossible for him not to know him, and there was only one son of the era of all races, and that was Ye Tian, and the master in front of him was definitely not Ye Tian.

Therefore, he is now very confused about the identity of the person in front of him.

"Little native, are you qualified to know my name?"

The man said disdainfully.

"What !!"

Feng Min was extremely annoyed, someone dared to despise him, and only he despised others.

"You're dead!"

Feng Min was furious, and casually unleashed an amazing supernatural power - Nine Heavens Wind Roar!

However, an astonishing scene happened.

The man just blasted with a light punch, instantly breaking his great supernatural powers, and then a punch broke through his defenses, annihilating nearly sixty percent of his body.

"It's so strong!!"

Feng Min's pupils shrank sharply, and he felt the threat of death.

Immediately, he was about to cast a secret treasure and escape, but the man cast a spell that sealed the void, and even his extremely rare secret treasure could not be activated.

"Although Your Excellency asked me to wait for less trouble, if you dare to make a move on me, you are simply looking for death!"

The man punched again.

The power of this punch was far more terrifying than the previous punch, and it instantly killed Feng Min.

"This is the son of the cosmic era that His Majesty said, it's too weak, and he can only be regarded as an ordinary genius in the chaos. If all the geniuses in the universe were like this, wouldn't I, Harmon, be able to sweep them all?"

Young Harmon laughed.

But then he became solemn again: "According to the division of this universe, I am now in charge of the realm, and above the master, there are Tianzun, Supreme, Tianzun realm, I am not afraid, but those supremes are not something I can provoke now." It's been tens of thousands of years since I came to this world, and the recovery speed of cultivation is a little slow, I don't know how the others are recovering?"

"It's time to leave, kill the son of an era, presumably those supremes should know, and you can't meet those supremes for the time being!"

With that, Harmon departed.

After leaving, he disrupted the plane.

......

"Feng Min has fallen!"

The Cold Spirit Supreme sensed Feng Min's fall, frowned, and immediately calculated, but found that it couldn't be calculated.

As a second-class supreme of the Twelve Universe Eras, although her status is not as good as that of the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supremes, she can also occupy a place among many supremes, and the son of the Fengmin Era is one of her personal disciples, and she is a very optimistic personal disciple.

But now, Feng Min was killed!

"Who the hell did that??"

The Cold Spirit Supreme was very annoyed.

For the first time, she thought of some Heavenly Venerables or Supremes among the ten thousand races.

In her opinion, it is impossible for the Era Supremes and the Supremes in the Twelve Cosmic Epochs to kill Feng Min, it can only be done by those Heavenly Lords or Supremes of the Ten Thousand Races, but where do they have the guts!

Swish!

The Cold Spirit Supreme is out of the customs and goes to the place where Feng Min fell.

Soon, she came to the secret realm of the Blood Cangxing Domain and found the remnants of Feng Min's fall.

But when she wanted to reverse time and space and look for a scene that happened in the past, she couldn't see the existence of the enemy, and time and space were erased by others.

"Damn, could it be that the first-class supreme has blocked time and space? No, how can all races have a first-class supreme! Or some special supreme treasure has blocked or disturbed time and space!"

The Cold Spirit Supreme guessed.

Although Feng Min's death is a small matter, it represents a signal, if she doesn't find out, she is unwilling.

Immediately, she contacted the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supremes.

When the Cold Spirit Supreme said the matter, it immediately attracted the attention of the Supreme Beings such as the Lord of the Yuan Gu.

Subsequently, the Lord of the Yuan Gu, the Golden Light Supreme, the Stone Dragon Supreme and other supremes also came here.

"Lord of Yuangu, please call the shots, Feng Min's death must not be counted like this!"

The Cold Spirit Supreme prays.

"Who did that?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked.

"Can't find out!" the Cold Spirit Supreme shook his head.

"Can't find out?" the Lord of the Ancient Dynasty frowned, and then he personally investigated the time and space, but he couldn't find the trace of the enemy, as if the other party was not in time and space at all.

"Lord of the Yuan Gu, you can't find out either?"

The Cold Spirit Supreme was surprised.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu guessed: "I am a top-notch first-class supreme, even if I am a first-class supreme, don't try to completely cover up time and space, and the space-time supreme treasure in the universe can't completely cover time and space." According to my guess, one is that the person has the supreme treasure of time and space, and the fate of that person is not in time and space, and it is difficult to explore. "

"What then?"

The Cold Spirit Supreme frowned.

"Cause and Effect Supreme, it's up to you!" the Lord of the Yuan Gu looked at the other Supreme.

This Cause and Effect Supreme has achieved an amazing achievement on the Path of Cause and Effect, cause and effect are different from time and space, the enemy may be able to shield time and space, but they cannot completely cover cause and effect, unless the opponent's strength is far beyond the Cause and Effect Supreme.

According to the guess of the Lord of the Yuan Dynasty, the strength of the other party should not be strong, if it is really a first-class supreme, it will not be able to deal with a junior, and kill the little master of Fengmin.

Therefore, the other party's fate is peculiar, and the time and space treasure makes it impossible for them to use time and space to track down, but they are expected to use cause and effect to find each other.

"Lord of the Yuan Gu, if I try, I may not be able to succeed, after all, I am only a second-class supreme!"

Cause and Effect Supreme Path.

Immediately, the Supreme of Cause and Effect began to exert the great power of cause and effect.

Since Feng Min and the Causal Supreme belong to the same camp, there is a little causal relationship, and the Causal Supreme is now following this causal connection to track down the existence of the enemy.

Rumble!!!!

The void opened, and a thread of cause and effect spread somewhere in the universe.

In the darkness, the Supreme of Cause and Effect saw a figure.

Suddenly.

A spell emerges and turns into a blade, severing the line of cause and effect.

The causal link is broken!

"The enemy has cut off my causal line, and I can't find it!"

The Causal Supreme shook his head.

"What, the other party can cut your cause and effect line, how difficult it is to cut the cause and effect, even I am not easy to cut your cause and effect line!" The Lord of the Yuan Gu was shocked, "Is the other party a first-class supreme?"

"No!" Cause and Effect Supreme shook his head, "The other party is just a master, but the means used are unheard of, and the means to cut off my causal line are not him, but a spell!"

"Juggernaut, is it Ye Tian of the Human Race?" asked the Lord of the Yuan Gu.

"No!" Cause and Effect Supreme said: "The other party is definitely not Ye Tian, Ye Tian's breath is very familiar to me, this person is obviously not Ye Tian, not even a human race, the breath is very strange, I can't say clearly!"

At this time, the Golden Light Supreme said: "Everyone, just one master can shield time and space, so that I and others cannot explore, and can also cut off the causal line of the Causal Supreme, all races can't do this, and no one among us can do this, and they can't do this." "

"Jinguang Supreme, what do you want to say?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said solemnly.

I saw the Golden Light Supreme pointing upwards and said, "What if it's from there!"
